description: Composition White floral printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has round neck with slit and 4 button placket with sequins, pintucks from neckline to empire line waist on front and back, three quarter length sleeves with piping running down their length and contrast cuffs, short vents at sides and contrast hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron Light and summery kurta from biba with an A-line skirt and cute pintucks on the bodice. Wear this over leggings or over trousers depending on the occasion. Smart enough to wear to the office or to a party, dress this kurta up by wearing bold earrings and bangles. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
